data.description: New Zealand tells Wellington residents to evacuate as rain threat worsens-SCMP

data.title: Kevin O'Leary Says Bitcoin, Ethereum Give Him Almost All Of Crypto Exposure: 'I Cut The Garbage And Kept What Works'
data.description: Investor Kevin O'Leary emphasized the significance of Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) in the cryptocurrency market, labeling all other coins as "garbage." O'Leary stressed the importance of a disciplined crypto strategy, advocating for focusing on BTC and ETH due to their liquidity, capturing 95%-97% of market volatility. He dismissed other coins as insignificant, lacking liquidity, institutional interest, and future potential. O'Leary, also known as "Mr. Wonderful," highlighted the need for performance over quantity, stating that having positions in BTC and ETH provides adequate market exposure. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Aktsiaselts Infortar to continue buy-back of up to 250,000 own shares
data.description: Following approval from the General Meeting of Shareholders on June 4, 2025, Aktsiaselts Infortar has chosen to proceed with the buy-back of 250,000 of its own shares. This decision aligns with the requirements outlined in the option plan.

data.title: Q1 2026 Trading Update and Invitation to Earnings Call
data.description: On April 20, 2026, DNO ASA, a Norwegian oil and gas operator, announced that it will release its Q1 2026 operational and interim financial results on May 7th at 07:00 (CET). Following this, there will be a video conference call with executive management at 10:00 (CET). The company also shared details about its production, sales volumes, prices, and other key information for the quarter.

data.title: TGS Announces Extension to Multi-Year Ocean Bottom Node Contract
data.description: A major energy data and intelligence provider, TGS, based in Oslo, Norway, has recently disclosed the extension of their exclusive Ocean Bottom Node (OBN) acquisition agreement in the Gulf of America. The contract has been prolonged for an extra three years. This extension signifies a significant development in the company's multi-year initiative in the region.
A subsidiary of EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS sold an office building at Menulio 11 in Vilnius
Trifork reveals new board members to boost product growth and AI strategy. #Trifork #boardmembers #productLedGrowth #AI
RUBIS announces new Supervisory Board composition with key members, including 8 directors.

data.title: LG ELECTRONICS REINFORCES PRESENCE IN PREMIUM BUILT-IN MARKET AT MILAN DESIGN WEEK 2026
data.description: A renowned company is unveiling the next generation of integrated appliances, featuring innovative design and advanced technology. LG Electronics is highlighting a range of built-in kitchen solutions under its SKS luxury brand and LG built-in lineup, with a strong focus on sophistication and technological advancements. This showcase includes various cutting-edge appliances, offering consumers a wide array of options to enhance their kitchen experience.

data.title: transcosmos organizes a well-digging volunteer project in Vietnam
data.description: transcosmos recently unveiled their commitment to tackling community-specific issues with a focus on environmental conservation, child support, and infrastructure projects. This initiative aims to address long-standing challenges by implementing continuous efforts. Located in Tokyo, the company made this announcement on April 20, 2026. Specifically, transcosmos highlighted the projects carried out by transcosmos technology Vietnam co., ltd. as part of this endeavor. By prioritizing these areas, transcosmos aims to make a tangible impact on the community.
Baltic Classifieds Group PLC sees its price target reduced to 240p by Panmure Liberum, down from 265p.
Iran says it has carried out executions of two individuals accused of belonging to a spy network connected to Israel, Mizan reports.
According to the BOJ quarterly survey in March, 83.7% of households in Japan expect higher prices in a year, compared with 86.0% earlier.
According to the BOJ survey, households in Japan forecast inflation at +11.4% on average and +10.0% at the median over the next year.
Travelers price target is trimmed to $318 by Jefferies from $321.
RBC reduces its target price on Wingstop Inc to $275 versus $340 earlier.
JPMorgan increases its target price on Carpenter Technology to $465 versus $394 earlier.

data.title: Bitcoin drops as US-Iran tensions escalate, falling below $74,000 after Iran's warning on a seized cargo ship.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin dropped to under $74,000 on Sunday following Iran's warning of retaliation against the US military seizure of an Iranian cargo ship.
TD Cowen reduces its target price on Equinor to NOK 356 versus NOK 397 earlier.

data.title: AAVE drops 20% post $293M Kelp DAO hack; TVL plunges $8B. Hackers create $195M bad debt, freeze $5.1B stablecoins.
data.description: Aave's total value locked (TVL) suffered an $8 billion loss following a security breach where hackers utilized stolen funds from Kelp DAO as collateral. This incident resulted in $195 million in bad debt and caused $5.1 billion worth of stablecoins to be frozen.
